Privacy Commitment

Transparency and local data processing are the foundations of Quick Financial Calculator.

📅 Last Revised: April 9, 2026 🔒 Browser-Side Compute ⚖️ GDPR & CCPA Compliant

Quick Navigation

  1. Data Processing Philosophy
  2. Local Calculation Security
  3. AdSense & Third-Party Cookies
  4. Regulatory Compliance
  5. Privacy Enquiries

1 Data Processing Philosophy

At Quick Financial Calculator, we believe your financial plans are your own business. Our application is architected to prioritize user privacy above all else.

Zero-Storage Policy: We do not store, log, or transmit any financial data you enter into our calculators. No databases are used to collect your private numbers.

2 Local Calculation Security

Every tool on this platform—from mortgage amortizations to tax estimators—executes calculations locally on your device using client-side JavaScript.

🔒 On-Device Only: Your inputs never leave your browser. This ensures that even if our servers were compromised, your financial information remains safe because it was never there to begin with.

3 Google AdSense & Third-Party Cookies

To keep our tools free for everyone, we display advertisements via Google AdSense. Google uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to our website or other websites.

Google’s use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads to you based on your visit to Quick Financial Calculator and/or other sites on the Internet.

Users may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings.

4 Regulatory Compliance

We respect international privacy standards, including the GDPR (Europe) and CCPA (California). Since we do not collect personal identifiable information (PII) through our tools, our footprint is minimal.

5 Privacy Enquiries

Technical Data Controller

👤 Md. Merajul Islam

🔗 Website: quickfincalc.com

📬 Contact: Official Support Channel

We review and respond to all privacy-related concerns within 48–72 hours.
